amendment.description: An amendment numbered 39 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to revise the Agriculture Advanced Research and Development Authority program to provide federal support for sustainable agriculture and innovative sustainability solutions.
amendment.purpose: Amendment revises the Agriculture Advanced Research and Development Authority program to provide federal support for sustainable agriculture and innovative sustainability solutions.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Scholten amendment (A024) as modified Agreed to by recorded vote: 233 - 194 (Roll no. 150).

action.text: Scholten amendment (A024) modified by unanimous consent. To strike Page 430 each time it appears, and insert Page 431.
Roll call votes on amendments in House
House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Scholten amendment (A024) as modified Agreed to by recorded vote: 233 - 194 (Roll no. 150).
